CVE-2019-9423.title: In opencv calls that use libpng, there is a possible out of bound ...
CVE-2019-9423.description: In opencv calls that use libpng, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges required. User interaction is not required for exploitation. Product: AndroidVersions: Android-10Android ID: A-110986616
